name: genai/web
description: Web/MVC layer over genai/http: #[Controller]/#[RestController] (with a base path) and #[Route] attributes, a View value object, a default genai/view engine (override with #[ViewRegister]), and a dispatcher. Routes compile to genai/routing's standalone matcher. Runtime is PHP 5.3-safe; the attributes/processors are PHP 8 build-time.

suggest.genai/di: The attributes extend GenAI\Di\Component so the di processor registers controllers as beans.
suggest.genai/dto: Provides the Serializer for Dispatcher::setSerializer() — JSON-serialize #[Dto] results.
suggest.genai/session: Backs Csrf / CsrfInterceptor (the token store); only loaded if you use CSRF.
